impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.subtitle: Information in accordance with § 5 TMG (German Telemedia Act)
impressum.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
impressum.disputeNote: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.liabilityText: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 (1) TMG. However, according to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected.
impressum.linksText: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.
impressum.copyrightText: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution, and any kind of use beyond the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewText: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this Privacy Policy. The use of our website is generally possible without providing personal data.
privacy.bookingDataText: When you make a booking, we collect the following personal data:
privacy.technicalDataText: When visiting our website, the web server automatically records log files that your browser transmits. These include browser type/version, operating system, referrer URL, hostname, and time of the server request.
privacy.purpose1: Processing and managing your apartment booking
privacy.purpose2: Sending booking confirmations and communication via email
privacy.paymentText: Payment processing is handled by Stripe, Inc. Your payment data is transmitted directly to Stripe and is not stored on our servers. Stripe's privacy policy applies to the processing of payment data. Visit stripe.com/privacy for more information.
privacy.rightsText: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rightAccess: Right of access to your personal data (Art. 15 GDPR)
privacy.rightCorrection: Right to rectification of inaccurate data (Art. 16 GDPR)
privacy.rightDeletion: Right to erasure / right to be forgotten (Art. 17 GDPR)
privacy.rightRestriction: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
privacy.rightObjection: Right to object to processing (Art. 21 GDPR)
privacy.retentionText: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected or as required by law. Booking data is retained for the duration required by German tax and commercial law (typically 10 years).
privacy.cookiesText: Our website uses only essential cookies required for the functionality of the website (e.g., language preference). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.changesText: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. The current version is always available on our website.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.scopeText: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all bookings made through our website for the holiday apartment "Alt-Berliner Eckkneipe" at 146A Gustav-Adolf-Straße, 13086 Berlin. By making a booking, you agree to these terms.
terms.bookingText: A booking is considered confirmed once payment has been successfully processed. You will receive a confirmation email with your booking details. The booking constitutes a binding rental agreement between you and the property owner.
terms.pricesText: All prices displayed on the website are in Euros (€) and include all applicable taxes. The total price is calculated based on the number of nights and the nightly rate displayed at the time of booking.
terms.paymentTermsText: Payment is processed securely via Stripe at the time of booking. We accept all major credit and debit cards. The full amount is charged upon booking confirmation.
terms.cancellationText: Free cancellation is available up to 7 days before check-in. Cancellations made less than 7 days before check-in are subject to a charge of the full booking amount. To cancel a booking, please contact us via email.
terms.checkinText: Check-in is available between 15:00 and 23:00. Check-out must be completed by 10:00. Early check-in or late check-out may be arranged upon request and availability. Key handover details will be provided in your confirmation email.
terms.rule2: Pets are allowed by prior arrangement.
terms.rule3: Parties and events are not permitted.
terms.rule5: Guests are responsible for any damage caused during their stay beyond normal wear and tear.
terms.liabilityText: The property owner is not liable for any loss, damage, or injury to guests or their belongings during their stay, except in cases of gross negligence or willful misconduct. Guests are advised to have appropriate travel insurance.
terms.governingLawText: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany. The place of jurisdiction is Berlin, Germany.
